subtitle.text: The Ancient Remnant was the door. Maledictus is the gate. Cursium is the key it drops. Get the key.

description: CH.11 · MALEDICTUS
▸ Maledictus is the cursed form.
It follows the Ancient Remnant.
It drops Cursium.
Cursium is the crafting gate to Ignis.
Kill Maledictus. Get the Cursium.
Then fight Ignis.
◈ MALEDICTUS — FIGHT OVERVIEW
└ Mid-tier Cataclysm boss — harder than Remnant
└ The 'cursed form': corruption-type attacks
AoE curse zones, phase-based corruption spread
└ Priority: move out of curse zones immediately
Curse status: reduces max HP temporarily
└ Melee window: very limited, use ranged or ISS
└ Recommended: Ignitium armor (if already farmed) OR
full diamond/netherite with Protection IV
◈ CURSIUM — GATE MATERIAL
└ cataclysm:cursium: drops from Maledictus
└ Used for: Cursium armor set (mid Cataclysm gear)
└ Required: to craft/unlock Ignis fight access
└ Needed quantity: check JEI for Cursium gear recipes
└ Farm Maledictus repeatedly — get 16+ Cursium
before attempting to progress to Ignis
◈ FIGHT POSITIONING
└ Maledictus arena: contained space, limited mobility
└ ISS Ender school: Blink or Phase Step for
curse zone escapes (fastest mobility option)
└ Holy school: Sacred Ground heals inside curse zones
(healing counters the curse damage per second)
└ Strength II beacon active: reduce kill time below
curse stack accumulation threshold
▸ The word 'maledictus' means cursed.
In the Old Language it means:
'that which was spoken against.'
Something was spoken against Maledictus
before it became what it is.
The scroll does not say what.
▶ Collect 4 Cursium
▶ Defeat Maledictus [check]
◇ Old Eye (endrem) requires Maledictus + Death Worm.
If you are hunting the Old Eye,
farm Maledictus and Death Worm in the same trip.
They share the same cursed-zone biome logic.
